title: phlegmariurus varius
intro: Phlegmariurus varius, also known as the variegated walking fern or climbing fern, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus varius include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
